content.text:
## Inventory complete — here's the plan

### What the inventory turned up

**~70 files** to move, **8 file edits**, **3 file deletions**, **1 daemon to stop**. No broken imports in the code that stays — your reflect + consolidate + brain.db + discover all come through clean.

One correction to flag: the Explore agent suggested removing `consolidateIfNeeded()` from `timers.ts`, but you explicitly said **save → reflect → consolidate stays**. I'll leave `timers.ts` alone. Both the reflect timer and the consolidate timer survive.

### The move — unified archive tree

I'm going to propose **`src/archive/asl/`** rather than `src/tools/archive/`, because ASL code lives in 3 directories (tools, libs, services) and a unified archive tree keeps it coherent and easy to find later. If you want me to spread it across `src/tools/archive/` + `src/libs/archive/` + `src/services/archive/` instead, say so.

Structure:
```
src/archive/asl/
├── README.md              ← "archived 2026-04-09, do not re-enable, see brain.db decision"
├── tools/
│   ├── asl-sync.ts
│   ├── autonomous-distill.ts
│   ├── distill-soul.ts
│   ├── review-staged.ts
│   ├── agent-state.ts
│   ├── migrate-staged-format.ts
│   ├── migrate-staged-pre-fix.ts
│   └── __tests__/
├── libs/
│   ├── autonomous-distill.ts
│   ├── gates.ts
│   ├── judge-panel.ts
│   ├── staged.ts
│   ├── distill-cache.ts
│   ├── agent-lifecycle.ts
│   ├── memory-hash.ts
│   ├── file-watcher.ts
│   ├── task-queue.ts
│   ├── __benchmarks__/
│   └── __tests__/
└── services/
    └── self-learning-daemon/
```

Archiving with `git mv` preserves history. The tool runner auto-discovers from `src/tools/` only, so moving tools out instantly disables them. Archived tests won't run by default since they're outside the discovered tree.

### Execution order (8 phases)

| # | Phase | Action | Reversible? |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Stop daemon** | `npm run asl:stop` (if running) | Yes |
| 2 | **Create archive tree** | `mkdir -p src/archive/asl/{tools,libs,services}` + README.md with archive note | Yes |
| 3 | **Move files** | `git mv` everything per the safe-to-move list | Yes (git history preserved) |
| 4 | **Edit hooks** | Remove lines 53–103 from `.claude/hooks/startup.ts` (daemon probe + readiness reader) | Yes |
| 5 | **Edit rules** | Remove "Self-Learning Lifecycle" section from `.claude/rules/architecture.md`; delete `.claude/rules/self-learning-pipeline.md`; delete `.claude/asl-readiness.json` | Deletions only via git |
| 6 | **Edit package.json** | Remove 5 `asl:*` scripts | Yes |
| 7 | **Mark vault project** | Add `ARCHIVED.md` to `vault/studio/projects/autonomous-self-learning/`; mark ASL-0027 task as cancelled (status: archived) | Yes |
| 8 | **Log + verify** | Decision to brain.db; `bun run tool --list` to confirm asl tools gone; quick `bun run tool reflect --help` + `consolidate-memory --help` smoke tests | — |

### What stays untouched (confirming the "working" parts)

- `src/tools/reflect.ts` ✓
- `src/tools/consolidate-memory.ts` ✓
- `src/tools/write-raw.ts` ✓
- `src/tools/brain.ts` + `src/libs/brain/*` ✓ (tables stay in schema, writes to dead tables just stop)
- `src/tools/discover.ts` ✓
- `src/servers/freddie-ai/timers.ts` ✓ (both reflect and consolidate timers stay running)
- `.claude/rules/memory-boundaries.md` ✓
- `vault/studio/memory/**` ✓ (inbox + knowledge + archive structure preserved)
- brain.db itself ✓ (no schema changes)

### What I'm NOT committing or pushing without explicit approval

This whole operation will be staged locally. I'll show you `git status` before any commit. You review and say "commit" or "roll back this one thing."

### One thing worth noting

The `vault/studio/projects/autonomous-self-learning/` directory has **28+ task docs**, PRINCIPLES.md, BRIEF.md, and research subdirs — that's a lot of engineering history. I'm going to **mark it archived** (ARCHIVED.md file), not delete it. The work happened; the lessons are in there; the brain.db history references it. Deleting it would be lossy. Sound right?

---

**Ready to execute?** If yes, I'll do phases 1–8 in sequence, pausing only if anything unexpected shows up. I'll report progress at each phase and show `git status` at the end before any commit.

`[1]` Execute the full plan as described
`[2]` Execute but use `src/tools/archive/` + `src/libs/archive/` + `src/services/archive/` split instead of unified tree
`[3]` Execute but also delete the `vault/studio/projects/autonomous-self-learning/` directory entirely (lose history)
`[4]` Stop — I want to look at something specific before proceeding
`[5]` Cancel the whole archive
